name: 老虎游戏-tiger casino&slot game
developer: 上海信虎文化传播有限公司
publisher: 上海信虎文化传播有限公司
short_description: "Tiger game" is a very fun small fresh beauty leisure entertainment chess and card mobile game. The game is simple, easy to play, fast-paced, and suitable for young and old. "Tiger game" introduces the current technology and supports one click login, which saves a long time for players to register.
detailed_description:
"Tiger game" is a game of chess and card entertainment, including: Beauty race, guess beauty clothes, guess beauty figure bra, slot, casino, tiger machine to pull a bully, fight landlord, mahjong, ten thousand people bet game, etc., while joining the challenge mode. You can compete with millions of game players at the same table and feel the joy everywhere in the game!

[purity, classics and joy coexist]
The first mobile terminal supports a variety of ways to play the Landlords game, stimulating fun play to enhance the fun of the game!
[beauty series games]
The first chess and card game with the theme of "beautiful picture" aims at the competition of beautiful women's race, clothing color, bra weight, etc., which is eye-catching and challenging
[all kinds of challenges are coming]
New challenge mode! Let you also experience the endless competition on your mobile phone, enjoy the stimulation of the impact of champions, and feel the fun of competition!
[Data information exchange]
All platform user data is completely interconnected, competing with hundreds of millions of players at the same table, truly feeling the joy everywhere!
[the most popular 100 player Bureau]
You will sit on the card table and have fun with your friends. The real scene game interface will make you feel the warmth of home.
[close to real playing experience]
The real card playing experience, the card playing no longer appears and disappears out of thin air, but remains on the table until the end of the game. In the future, we will add hand flying animation to let you experience the real playing process!
[interesting game animation]
Airplanes, bombs and landlord peasants also have rich expressions and actions, adding more joy to the fight against landlord.
[clean and fresh design industry]
Small fresh interface design suitable for summer heat, let you feel different leisure, entertainment, chess and card style
